headline: How Low Can Lowe’s Stock Go?
summary: Every seasoned investor knows that market shocks are inevitable, but few are prepared for the specific depth of the hit. Historically, across 15 major crises, Lowe's (NYSE: LOW) absorbs an average drawdown of 18% compared to the S&P 500’s average decline of 16%. While the stock often tracks the broader market, certain economic fractures trigger a much steeper trapdoor effect that catches retail investors off guard.

headline: Lowe's Launches "Epically More Messi" Campaign to Celebrate Soccer Fever With Its Loyalty Members This Summer
summary: As anticipation builds for the world's biggest soccer moment, Lowe's is going all-in on soccer fandom by rewarding its MyLowe's Rewards and MyLowe's Pro Rewards loyalty members with "Epically More Messi," a new campaign designed to bring the brand's most loyal fans closer to the game – and the greatest player of all time.

summary: Michael Kantrowitz, Piper Sandler chief investment strategist, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss market resilience to recent macro headwinds, predictions on moves out of the Federal Reserve, recent economic data, and more.

headline: Lowe's Pro Card Launch Aims To Deepen Rewards And Undervaluation Story
summary: Lowe's Companies (NYSE:LOW) has launched the MyLowe's Pro Rewards American Express Card in partnership with Synchrony and American Express. The new co-branded card gives Pro customers rewards on purchases both at Lowe's locations and with other merchants that accept American Express. The product is aimed at expanding payment flexibility and rewards options for business customers who shop regularly for home improvement supplies. Lowe's, trading at around $220.45, is putting more focus on its...
